plugins.name: tdd-master
plugins.description: TDD plugin with Red-Green-Refactor workflow, testing patterns, and TDD-focused agent for Python/Django projects.

plugins.name: functional-clarity
plugins.description: Functional Clarity principles — philosophy for building reliable, simple, and understandable code. 22 principles, Python style guide, fail-fast architecture.

plugins.name: llms-keeper
plugins.description: Maintain llms.txt + llms-full.txt for any project following llmstxt.org standard. AI-optimized project context that works with any AI tool.

plugins.name: planner
plugins.description: End-to-end feature pipeline: requirements (/plan-feat, /plan-jira), planning (/plan), implementation orchestration (/plan-do), post-task reflection (/plan-reflect). Detects agent-catalog gaps and learns from past sessions.

plugins.name: sdlc
plugins.description: SDLC pipeline plugin: 3 agents (architect, code-implementer, code-reviewer) covering design → implement → review across Python backend and React frontend. Stack-aware via on-demand references. References tdd-master and functional-clarity instead of duplicating.
